experience.title: AI Content & Annotation Specialist (Multimodal Projects)
highlights: Dataset Development: Created and annotated 500+ high-quality design samples (brand books, logos, infographics, illustrations, realistic images) for generative AI training.
Workflow Optimization: Developed a 10-step methodology to convert complex visual designs into structured textual instructions.
Visual Grounding: Sourced assets via Ingimage, structured layouts in Figma, provided detailed annotations for AI model fine-tuning.

projects.title: Ma'chalet — Alaska Retreat
projects.description: Design presentation for an Armenian-themed chalet in Alaska. Client persona: Angela Sarafyan (Armenian actress, 41, nature lover). Palette: Blood Red, Almond Milk, Chicory Coffee, Desert Taupe. Concept: 'Where Adventure Meets Serenity'.

projects.title: Makhmur Handmade
projects.description: Commercial pitch deck for Makhmur, an Armenian handmade accessories brand (bags, card holders, lipstick cases with embroidery). Positioned as corporate gifting with Armenian cultural identity. Instagram: @makhmur_handmade

projects.title: Narekatsin National Jewellery
projects.description: Presentation for Narekatsin, an Armenian national jewellery revival brand with 35+ years of history. Designs include Van-Vaspurakan necklaces, Kars filigree bracelets, Artsakh symbols. Founded by Mher Sahakyan and Elen Arzumanian.

projects.title: NewPro Containers Catalogue

projects.title: CheFoodie App
projects.description: Mobile app UI design for CheFoodie — a food discovery app that matches users with restaurants based on shared dining interests. Features: AI-powered deal finder, 2-for-1 Happy Hour promotions, social matching. 'Find More Deals With Ai'.
